zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwladus ferch Gwilym於大約1555年出生在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾利安代福時，她的父親Gwilym ap Morgan22歲，母親Joan ferch Dafydd19歲。她和John ap Hywel ab Edward ap Badi至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwladus ferch Gwilym于大约1555年出生在英国威尔斯布雷康史爾利安代福时，她的父亲Gwilym ap Morgan22岁，母亲Joan ferch Dafydd19岁。她和John ap Hywel ab Edward ap Badi至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Gwladus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old form of   Gladys  , of uncertain derivation.

variants.name: Gwladys
meanings: Old form of   Gladys  , of uncertain derivation.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwladus ferch Gwilym was born about 1555, in Llanddew, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Gwilym ap Morgan, was 22 and her mother, Joan ferch Dafydd, was 19. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with John ap Hywel ab Edward ap Badi.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwladus ferch Gwilym est née environ 1555, à Llanddew, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gwilym ap Morgan, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan ferch Dafydd, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec John ap Hywel ab Edward ap Badi.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwladus ferch Gwilym um 1555 in Llanddew, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gwilym ap Morgan 22 und ihre Mutter Joan ferch Dafydd 19. Sie hatte mit John ap Hywel ab Edward ap Badi mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwladus ferch Gwilym è nata il circa 1555 nel Llanddew, Breconshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gwilym ap Morgan, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Joan ferch Dafydd, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con John ap Hywel ab Edward ap Badi.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwladus ferch Gwilymが約1555年にイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアランッドエウで生まれた時，父Gwilym ap Morganは22歳，母Joan ferch Dafyddは19歳であった。彼女はJohn ap Hywel ab Edward ap Badiとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwladus ferch Gwilym(이)가 대략 1555년 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르 랜데w에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gwilym ap Morgan(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan ferch Dafydd(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 John ap Hywel ab Edward ap Badi(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwladus ferch Gwilym nasceu aproximadamente 1555, em Llanddew, Breconshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gwilym ap Morgan, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joan ferch Dafydd, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com John ap Hywel ab Edward ap Badi.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwladus ferch Gwilym родилась около 1555 г. в местности лланддю, брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gwilym ap Morgan было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan ferch Dafydd, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от John ap Hywel ab Edward ap Badi.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwladus ferch Gwilym nació aproximadamente 1555, en Llanddew, Breconshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gwilym ap Morgan, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Joan ferch Dafydd, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con John ap Hywel ab Edward ap Badi.
